## Required Steps

- [ ] Step 1: Create your `github-startup` repo from the template (README)
- [ ] Step 2: Run **Initialize Tutorial Issues** from the Actions tab (README)
- [ ] Step 3: Upload Files and Edit with github.dev (`docs/steps/02-upload-and-github-dev.md`)
- [ ] Step 4: Publish with GitHub Pages (`docs/steps/03-publish-with-github-pages.md`)
- [ ] Step 5: Install GitHub Desktop and Clone Your Repo (`docs/steps/04-install-github-desktop.md`)
- [ ] Step 6: Open in Your AI Coding Tool and Build Your Dashboard (`docs/steps/05-open-in-ai-tool-and-build.md`)
- [ ] Step 7: Commit and Push from GitHub Desktop (`docs/steps/06-commit-push-from-desktop.md`)

## Tool Notes and Advanced Addendums

- [ ] Addendum A: Open This Folder in Codex (`docs/addendums/addendum-a-link-codex.md`) - <https://chatgpt.com/codex/>
- [ ] Addendum B: Open This Folder in Claude Code (`docs/addendums/addendum-b-link-claude-code.md`) - <https://code.claude.com/docs/en/overview>
- [ ] Addendum C: GitHub CLI / Terminal Authentication (`docs/addendums/addendum-c-github-cli-login.md`)
- [ ] Addendum D: Open This Folder in VS Code (`docs/addendums/addendum-d-open-in-vscode.md`)

## Notes

Use this space to track blockers, questions, and links.
